title: CRYPTREC Cryptographic Technology Guideline - Post-Quantum Cryptography (FY2024 Edition)
summary: FY2024 edition of CRYPTREC's cryptographic technology guideline on post-quantum cryptography (耐量子計算機暗号), covering PQC public-key algorithms with quantum resistance for Japanese government and industry use.

title: CRYPTREC Cryptographic Technology Guideline - Post-Quantum Cryptography (2022)
summary: First edition of CRYPTREC's guideline on post-quantum cryptography (GL-2004-2022), setting out the necessity of PQC and surveying candidate algorithm families.

title: Publication of the FY2024 PQC Guideline and PQC Research Trends Survey Report
summary: CRYPTREC announcement (2 April 2025) of the publication of the FY2024 post-quantum cryptography guideline and an accompanying survey report on PQC research trends.

title: Cryptographic Technology Evaluation Committee Activity Report (CRYPTREC Symposium 2025)
summary: Activity report of CRYPTREC's Cryptographic Technology Evaluation Committee, covering the PQC working group's monitoring of developments and security and implementation-performance evaluation of the NIST standards FIPS 203, 204 and 205.

title: Use of Post-Quantum Cryptography in Government Agencies (Cross-Ministerial Policy Council)
summary: Cabinet Secretariat page for the cross-ministerial council examining and promoting measures for the use of post-quantum cryptography (PQC) in Japanese government agencies, coordinated across relevant ministries.

title: Digital Minister Press Conference on Post-Quantum Cryptography (21 November 2025)
summary: Press conference by Japan's Digital Minister discussing post-quantum cryptography (PQC) as cryptography secure against both quantum and conventional computers, in the context of government adoption.

title: Next-Generation My Number Card Task Force - Interim Summary
summary: Interim summary of the Digital Agency task force on the next-generation My Number identity card, which keeps open the future adoption of post-quantum cryptography (PQC) in case current schemes are compromised before 2050.

title: Digital Agency FY2026 Budget and Organisation Outline
summary: Digital Agency outline of the FY2026 budget and staffing plan, listing the promotion of government migration to post-quantum cryptography (PQC) as a trust-policy priority with new staff positions.

title: Secretariat Briefing - Verifiable Credentials / Digital Identity Wallet Governance Working Group
summary: Digital Agency secretariat briefing for the working group on verifiable credentials and digital identity wallet governance, noting the importance of crypto-agility in anticipation of PQC adoption. Flagged for review: PQC is a passing reference, not the document's subject.
